# PHAssetEditOperation.content

**Case**

The asset’s photo or video content can be edited.

## Declaration

```swift
case content
```

## Discussion

To begin the process of editing an asset, use the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAsset/requestContentEditingInput(with:completionHandler:)] method.

## Constants

- **PHAssetEditOperation.delete**: The asset can be deleted from the photo library.
- **PHAssetEditOperation.properties**: The asset’s metadata properties can be edited.
